sjas_frontier_summary: SJAS nachlass LOG.md describes Proflog ADR-0063 through ADR-0068 work from May 2026, including arithmetized formula/system/proof codes, structural code decoding, Level-1 substitution-proof vocabulary, SelfCons1 construction, subst-prf/4, subst-code/2, tableau-proof/3, and passing focused SJAS gates.
decision_rationale: Public Proflog main is relevant background for Fitting-style semantic tableaux, but it is not the active SJAS/Proflog frontier described by SJAS logs and it does not run under Guile in this environment. AS should not make public main a dependency until the active ADR-006x source is recovered, pushed, or deliberately replaced.
next_actions: Ask the repository owner where the ADR-0063 through ADR-0068 Proflog work lives or whether it should be published.
If the active source is unavailable, treat AS-local proof certificates and Willard anchor work as the safe path until a replacement tableaux/code proof apparatus is chosen.
Do not cite public jpt4/proflog main as executable SJAS evidence beyond the basic Fitting-style Proflog background.
